title: Does anyone know where I can get this Evangelion 10 poster
display_title: Does anyone know where I can get this Evangelion 10 poster
wikitext:
[]: Does anyone know where I can get this Evangelion 1.0 poster?             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Tue Nov 09, 2010 11:00 am Does anyone know where I can get this Evangelion 1.0 Poster for delivery to the UK? Or at least any websites likely to have it? Thanks in advance for any help. EDIT: Fixed the image. It was working fine last night, though.

[]: Re: Does anyone know where I can get this Evangelion 1.0 pos             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Nov 09, 2010 5:51 pm liquidus118 wrote: Does anyone know where I can get this Evangelion 1.0 Poster for delivery to the UK? Or at least any websites likely to have it? Thanks in advance for any help.

[]: Re: Does anyone know where I can get this Evangelion 1.0 pos             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 09, 2010 7:15 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: uh... it might help if we had a image to go off of.

[]: Re: Does anyone know where I can get this Evangelion 1.0 pos             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Nov 09, 2010 9:15 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: It was this one probably...

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Wed Nov 10, 2010 10:46 pm When it comes to movie posters, especially foreign movie posters you've got to know where to look to find your holy grail. Most promotional posters were never meant to be circulated outside of the movie theatre. Those that you do see in collectors rooms or on the secondary market were likely snatched by people from the movie theatres or perhaps from a film industry related office. Its hard enough to find posters for the recent Evangelion 2.0 movie let alone that special poster your looking for. To my knowledge i've only seen an illustration of that Eva used for the movie program that was given out in Japanese theatres during the Evangelion 1.0 screenings. I have never seen or heard of people obtaining a poster with that image printed on it. Well in any case your best luck is to look online on Ebay, or to contact dealers in your city or online that deal primarily collecting and selling movie posters. Evangelion 1.0 is an anime, albeit not a well known anime. As far as i know, anime posters are definitely even harder to come by these days due to their relative obscurity outside of Japan and their popularity amongst fans. If there was ever such a poster, they would have likely been snatched up by Japanese fans first. Highly unlikely to see a American poster dealer snatch one of these up.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Thu Nov 11, 2010 12:01 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: When it comes to movie posters, especially foreign movie posters you've got to know where to look to find your holy grail. Most promotional posters were never meant to be circulated outside of the movie theatre. Those that you do see in collectors rooms or on the secondary market were likely snatched by people from the movie theatres or perhaps from a film industry related office. Its hard enough to find posters for the recent Evangelion 2.0 movie let alone that special poster your looking for. To my knowledge i've only seen an illustration of that Eva used for the movie program that was given out in Japanese theatres during the Evangelion 1.0 screenings. I have never seen or heard of people obtaining a poster with that image printed on it. Well in any case your best luck is to look online on Ebay, or to contact dealers in your city or online that deal primarily collecting and selling movie posters. Evangelion 1.0 is an anime, albeit not a well known anime. As far as i know, anime posters are definitely even harder to come by these days due to their relative obscurity outside of Japan and their popularity amongst fans. If there was ever such a poster, they would have likely been snatched up by Japanese fans first. Highly unlikely to see a American poster dealer snatch one of these up.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Nov 11, 2010 9:35 pm Talk to the people at Asylum Anime (Warning: really ugly webpage ahead). They're also at most big anime conventions. They seem to have really good connections in Japan; I have a full 6-poster FLCL Laserdisc promotional set from them. I've never seen another merchant, in the US or Japan, who can approach the quality of their stock.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Fri Nov 12, 2010 2:42 am drinian wrote: Talk to the people at Asylum Anime (Warning: really ugly webpage ahead). They're also at most big anime conventions. They seem to have really good connections in Japan; I have a full 6-poster FLCL Laserdisc promotional set from them. I've never seen another merchant, in the US or Japan, who can approach the quality of their stock.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Fri Nov 12, 2010 9:01 am Electric Sachiel wrote: I assume you need to talk with them directly..... Cuz all i see on their crappy website is anime cels and cosplay costumes.
